'''Glie'oleg Kru''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] serving the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Holding the rank of [[Brevet]] Admiral, he was in command of the [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]], [[Champion (Bothan Assault Cruiser)|''Champion'']] and led New Republic forces during the [[Battle of Kalarba]]. He was killed when the ''Champion'' was destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces.<ref name="TCSWE" />
